title: 3D dot plot 三合一
what: Static 3-in-1 dot plot: 15 genes (rows) × 3 conditions (cols); dot color = signed effect (RdBu_r, 0-centered), dot size = DE-gene count. All effects negative (knockdowns).

title: Volcano 火山圖
what: Pseudo-volcano (title states no p-value): effect size vs log10 DE-gene count, colored by condition; off-target-flagged rows drawn as open grey excluded markers (§1.1); 50-DE gate line; 8 unique extreme genes labeled.

title: QC funnel 篩選漏斗
what: QC funnel centered bars: 33,983 → ≥200 cells 30,515 → significant 19,297 → no off-target 16,998 → ≥50 DE genes 2,131 (6.3%); reconciles exactly to passes_gate.

title: Violin 小提琴圖
what: 小提琴圖：三條件(Rest/Stim8hr/Stim48hr)的 logDE=log10(n_total_de_genes+1) 分佈，含中位/IQR。offtarget_flag 列已排除，n=10,344/10,423/10,379。

title: Q-Q plot 常態檢查
what: Q-Q 常態檢查：三條件 ontarget_effect_size(真實顯著敲低,非零) vs 常態分位數，R²≈0.90，尾端脫離顯示左偏重尾非常態。

title: Box 箱型圖
what: 箱型圖：同 logDE 三條件並排，中位皆 2 個 DE 基因；離群點以淡灰散點表示。

title: Ridgeline 堆疊密度
what: 堆疊密度(ridgeline)：三條件 logDE 密度曲線 + 中位線，形狀高度重疊。

title: Histogram 直方圖
what: 直方圖(step)：三條件 logDE 計數分佈，強烈右偏且三線幾乎完全重合。

title: ECDF 累積分佈
what: ECDF 累積分佈：三條件 logDE，標註 76.7%(所繪 offtarget-排除集)標的下游 DE≤8 基因(即 logDE<1)的位置。

title: Strip 抖動散點
what: 抖動散點(strip)：15 個 shortlist 基因的 ontarget_effect_size 依三條件分組 + 中位橫線；n=14/13/15。

title: Swarm 蜂群圖
what: 蜂群圖(swarm)：同 shortlist 效應量非重疊佈局 + 中位橫線，密度反映敲低強度分佈。

title: Raincloud 雨雲圖
what: 雨雲圖：三條件 logDE 的半小提琴(雲)+箱(5–95%鬚)+抖動點(雨)三層合一。

title: 1D KDE 密度曲線
what: 1D KDE 密度曲線疊圖：三條件 logDE 平滑密度，三線重合；最常見值為 1 個下游 DE 基因(n_total_de_genes=1，count=7,316，為單一眾數)，密度峰在所繪軸(DE+1)約 2.2–2.3 處。

title: Treemap 矩形樹圖
what: 矩形樹圖。欄=culture_condition，內層=ontarget_effect_category，面積∝DE統計列數(全圖n=33,983)。on-target敲低約62%、三條件結構一致；疑似off-target(全體384列,約1%)以紅框斜線帶+引線標籤標出，caption已明確區分全圖總數與off-target子集數。

title: Sunburst 放射階層
what: 放射階層(sunburst)。內環=培養條件、外環=on-target效應類別，扇角∝列數。三條件效應類別組成幾乎相同。

title: Icicle 冰柱階層
what: 冰柱階層。三層由左至右：全部→culture_condition→ontarget_effect_category，矩形高∝列數。逐層拆分 33,983 列。

title: Sankey 流向圖
what: 流向圖(手繪流帶)。四道門檻篩選級聯：全部→細胞數≥200→顯著on-target→無off-target→DE基因≥50。藍帶保留、灰帶淘汰，33,983→2,131。

title: Funnel 互動漏斗
what: 互動漏斗靜態版。同一四關篩選，居中漏斗顯示各關列數、佔全體%與逐關保留率；DE基因≥50為最嚴一關(保留約13%)。

title: Parallel coordinates 平行座標
what: 平行座標。三個無缺失非冗餘數值特徵(n_cells_target, |ontarget_effect_size|, n_total_de_genes)百分位化；細線抽樣、粗線=三條件中位軌跡。三條件分布幾乎重疊。

title: Parallel categories 類別平行
what: 類別平行(alluvial)。四維:culture_condition→ontarget_effect_category→n_total_genes_category→passes_gate，帶寬∝列數並依條件著色。通過門檻的2,131列全為on-target敲低且>10 DE基因。

title: 相關性熱圖
what: Pearson correlation heatmap of 6 numeric features (cells, genes up/down, total DE, on-target effect, downstream) over 31,146 on-target rows; diverging RdBu centred at 0, all 36 values printed, redundant n_DE vs n_downstream pair (r=1.00) boxed.

title: Gene×condition DE 熱圖
what: Gene x condition n_DE heatmap for the 15 shortlist genes (magma, log scale) with row dendrogram and per-cell counts; a TCR-signaling cluster (CD3E/LAT/PLCG1/CD247/VAV1, labelled green) responds far more strongly after stimulation than at rest (rest is the minimum for all five; stimulated counts >=50x higher).

title: 階層聚類熱圖
what: Same correlation matrix reordered by hierarchical clustering (1-|r|, average linkage) with dendrogram on top; the four DE-count metrics collapse into one block.

title: Hexbin 六角密度
what: Hexbin density of cells assayed (x, log) vs total DE genes+1 (y, log), LogNorm colourbar; median=2 DE genes line shows most perturbations move few genes regardless of cell count.

title: 2D density 密度散點
what: 2D density scatter (points coloured by local 2D-histogram density, LogNorm) of on-target effect size vs total DE genes (log), 25,920 rows with DE>0; stronger knockdown coincides with broader response.

title: Scatter matrix 散點矩陣
what: 4x4 scatter matrix (hexbin off-diagonal, histograms on diagonal) of cells/effect/DE genes/genes-up in log space; effect size decouples from the tightly-coupled count metrics.

title: 條件×指標熱圖
what: Condition x metric heatmap (7 metrics x Rest/Stim8hr/Stim48hr), row z-score colour with raw values annotated; hit-rate & knockdown strength rise with stimulation, mean DE breadth peaks at 8h. Condition ticks in fixed colours.

title: Joint scatter 邊際散點
what: Joint hexbin (all rows, greys) + gate-passing overlay (2,131 rows, red) of cells vs DE genes with marginal histograms and gate thresholds (>=200 cells, >=50 DE genes) drawn.

title: Dendrogram 聚類樹
what: Standalone Ward dendrogram clustering the 15 shortlist genes by their 3-condition effect-size profile; CVD-safe link palette, italic gene labels.

title: Contour 等高線
what: Filled 2D-KDE contour of on-target effect size vs total DE genes (log) over the populated range; response mass concentrated at weak knockdown and few DE genes.

title: STRING 網路
what: shortlist 基因的已知蛋白交互網路（STRING/文獻）；三模組圓形叢集佈局。節點色=功能模組(TCR近端訊號/SAGA/Mediator)，節點大小∝|平均在標效應量|(effect_matrix 三條件均值)，邊=已知PPI。

title: Chord 環形網路
what: 同一 16 節點網路的環形(chord)呈現；節點依模組排在圓環上，弧線=已知PPI，色隨模組。凸顯三模組各自內部緊密、彼此無已知直接交互。節點大小∝|平均在標效應量|。

title: Venn 文氏圖
what: 基因層三集合文氏圖：顯著命中(7,913)、通過門檻(1,235)、有脫靶(1,152)。由 raw 的 ontarget_significant/offtarget_flag 與 curated 的 passes_gate 依基因彙整。顯示通過門檻全內含於顯著，脫靶有93獨立。

title: Manhattan 曼哈頓式
what: 曼哈頓式散點：x=標的基因(字母序)，y=下游DE基因數(log, n_total_de_genes)，色=三條件。排除脫靶列。標註15個shortlist中DE>1000者，凸顯少數核心標的驅動多數下游反應。

title: Slope 斜率圖
what: 斜率圖：15個shortlist基因在 Rest→Stim8hr→Stim48hr 的在標效應量(effect_matrix)變化。色=刺激後減弱(12/15)/增強(3/15)；右端展開式基因標籤。

title: Stacked area 堆疊面積
what: 堆疊面積：三條件(時序)下受影響標的依 DE 基因數分層(1–9/10–49/50–199/200–999/≥1000)之組成。由 de_matrix 計算,僅計有≥1個DE基因的標的(n=9,399/9,672/9,686)。顯示廣效標的略增、整體組成穩定。

title: UpSet plot 集合交集
what: UpSet 集合交集(matplotlib自繪)：4集合 顯著(7,913)/通過門檻(1,235)/脫靶(1,152)/廣效(10)。上方=交集大小長條，左方=集合總量，點矩陣=成員組合。

title: Lollipop 排序
what: Dumbbell/lollipop of 15 shortlist genes ranked by max downstream-DE breadth (de_matrix Rest/Stim8hr/Stim48hr); 3 condition dots + connector per gene. Cover图, title qualified to true form: breadth peaks under stimulation for 14 of 15 (only UBXN1 peaks at Rest).

title: Dot-plot matrix (scanpy式)
what: Scanpy-style dot-plot matrix: 15 genes × 3 conditions, dot size = breadth (de_matrix), dot color = signed effect (effect_matrix) on RdBu_r diverging map centered at semantic zero (§4.4). Effect strength and breadth diverge across targets/time.

title: Diverging bar 分歧長條
what: 0-centered diverging bar: downstream genes down-regulated (left) vs up-regulated (right) per shortlist gene, Stim8hr, on-target-significant & non-offtarget rows only (n_up_genes/n_down_genes). Up>down for 12 of 13.

title: Stacked bar 組成長條
what: 100% stacked bar of response-size composition (n_total_genes_category: no effect/1/2-10/>10 DE) across all tested knockdowns per condition. Sequential single-hue ramp; composition nearly constant across conditions.

title: Waterfall 瀑布圖
what: Waterfall of all 6,290 Stim8hr on-target-significant knockdowns ranked by signed on-target effect; 4 strongest shortlist genes leader-labeled (staggered). Nearly all reduce expression with a deep tail (min ≈ −51).

title: Bubble 泡泡圖
what: Bubble: breadth (log x) vs on-target effect (y), bubble size = n_cells_target, color = condition, shortlist rows. Silencing strength & breadth vary independently (Spearman ρ≈0, verified).

title: Grouped bar 分組長條
what: Grouped bar: downstream-DE breadth by condition for top-6 targets (de_matrix), 3 bars/gene fixed colors. Peak response lands at 8hr not 48hr for all 6.

title: Bar with error bars 誤差棒長條
what: Bar + 95% CI (t-dist) of mean on-target effect per condition (included KDs; n printed). Silencing strength stable across conditions (−11.4/−12.3/−12.1).

title: Point plot 點趨勢
what: Point/slope trend of breadth across 3 conditions for 15 shortlist genes (thin raw lines) + bold median diamond glyph. Median breadth peaks at 8hr (4,142) then narrows by 48hr (3,114).

title: MA plot
what: MA plot: target baseline expression (log x) vs on-target effect, Stim8hr; not-significant grey, on-target KD orange, off-target flagged as open red rings (§1.1). Detectable across full expression range.

title: PCA 主成分
what: PCA(PC1 55%, PC2 33%) of 11,086 targets on standardized 3-condition effect + log1p(nDE) features; grey = other targets (9,861), viridis = gate-passing (1,225) colored by mean |effect|, 15 curated shortlist ringed with leader labels, corner arrows per §6.6.

title: t-SNE
what: t-SNE of the same target×condition feature matrix; grey other / viridis gate-passing / ringed shortlist, corner arrows — response neighbourhoods grouping curated targets.

title: UMAP
what: UMAP of the same feature matrix; grey other / viridis gate-passing / ringed shortlist — curated targets share response neighbourhoods.

title: Radar 雷達圖
what: Radar over the 15 shortlist genes (spokes) with three condition polygons = on-target |effect size|; fixed Rest/Stim8hr/Stim48hr colors, radial limit tightened to data.

title: Circular bar 環形長條
what: Circular grouped bar: 15 shortlist genes ranked by 3-condition mean |effect|, three bars/gene by condition; CCNC ranks top.

title: PCA biplot 載荷雙標圖
what: PCA biplot: PC1/PC2 scores + loading arrows for 6 features (3 effect condition-colored, 3 nDE neutral); effect and DE-count load on opposing PC1 directions, effect trio near-collinear.
